name: investigations-increase-reg-captcha
description: Investigate registration signup drop on 2026-04-07 triggered by reactive reg model deployment (paused since Mar 9, re-deployed today). IM team asked to confirm whether the inflated signups over the past 4-5 weeks were abuse (from paused model + scraping attacks) or organic. Need to identify IOCs at registration, captcha, and member tables to attribute the spike and validate that the model revert + future re-ramp is safe.
